parsed.generic_mechanism: Persuasion strengthens when each chapter turns a claim into a causal model, tests it against familiar experience, and hands a resolved premise to the next chapter; disordered components cannot accumulate even when individually relevant.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The block contains fragments of a withdrawal-relief model, learned reward associations, and restriction backfire, but sentences, headings, examples, and conclusions arrive in abrupt or reversed order, preventing those ideas from forming a usable intervention.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The chapters successively recast apparent pleasure as relief of a self-created urge, explain how natural preferences are exploited, then connect conditioning and failed restriction to repeated consumption, making freedom and restored choice increasingly plausible.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: The block contains fragments of a withdrawal-relief model, learned reward associations, and restriction backfire, but sentences, headings, examples, and conclusions arrive in abrupt or reversed order, preventing those ideas from forming a usable intervention.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The chapters successively recast apparent pleasure as relief of a self-created urge, explain how natural preferences are exploited, then connect conditioning and failed restriction to repeated consumption, making freedom and restored choice increasingly plausible.
